summary: Completed testing of Wildly Ones e-commerce platform refactored features. Backend: 21/21 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components verified. All 7 AI agents available, Home Goods category has 12 products, all product ratings between 4.5-5.0.

minor.issue: WebSocket external connection shows error in browser console but internal WS works. Expected in preview environment.

passed_tests: Backend: API health check returns healthy status
Backend: All 7 AI agents available at /api/agents endpoint
Backend: product_sourcing agent with complete metadata
Backend: due_diligence agent with complete metadata
Backend: copywriter agent with complete metadata
Backend: seo_content agent with complete metadata
Backend: performance_marketing agent with complete metadata
Backend: email_marketing agent with complete metadata
Backend: customer_service agent with complete metadata
Backend: Home Goods category returns 12 products at /api/products?category=home_goods
Backend: Home Goods includes beds, feeders, blankets, bowls, fountains, mats
Backend: All 46 products have ratings between 4.5 and 5.0
Backend: User registration endpoint working
Backend: User login endpoint working
Backend: Admin login with admin@wildlyones.com / admin123 working
Backend: Auth requires token (returns 401 without)
Backend: Products filtering by pet_type working (dog, cat, both)
Backend: Featured products endpoint working
Backend: Bestsellers endpoint working
Backend: Categories endpoint returns home_goods
Frontend: Home page loads with Wildly Ones branding
Frontend: Navigation has all pet type links (Dogs, Cats, Birds, Fish, Rabbits, Small Pets)
Frontend: Sign-in button visible
Frontend: Login flow working - auth modal opens, credentials accepted
Frontend: Products page loads with product cards
Frontend: Home Goods category shows products
Frontend: AI Agents page at /admin/agents loads correctly
Frontend: All 7 agent tabs visible (Product Sourcing, Due Diligence, Copywriter, SEO Blog Writer, Ads & Social, Email Marketing, Customer Service)
Frontend: Agent tab switching works
Frontend: Chat input and send button present
Frontend: Example prompts displayed for each agent
critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring looks well-structured with modular routes, services, and models
All 7 AI agents properly integrated with appropriate system prompts
Home Goods category has comprehensive product selection

seed_data_creation: Test user created during testing for authentication verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactored into modular structure (routes/, services/, models/, core/). All 7 AI agents (product_sourcing, due_diligence, copywriter, seo_content, performance_marketing, email_marketing, customer_service) available via /api/agents. Home Goods category has 12 products including calming beds, automatic feeders, water fountains, warming mats, etc. All products have ratings between 4.5-5.0 stars. Navigation has pet type dropdowns for Dogs, Cats, Birds, Fish, Rabbits, Small Pets. AI Agents page at /admin/agents shows all agent tabs and chat interface.

mocked_apis.17Track API: MOCKED - TRACK17_API_KEY may not be configured
mocked_apis.AI Agents: LIVE - Using EMERGENT_LLM_KEY for Claude/GPT models

agents: product_sourcing - Find winning pet wellness products with margin analysis
due_diligence - Verify suppliers and products for safety & compliance
copywriter - Generate Shopify product listings with SEO
seo_content - Write ranking blog content for pet parents
performance_marketing - Create Meta ads, TikTok scripts, Instagram captions
email_marketing - Write Klaviyo email flows (cart, welcome, post-purchase)
customer_service - Draft support responses for shipping, returns, complaints
